name: hermit
description: Local file-first runtime for autonomous applications, powered by pi-mono.

scripts.start:session: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh ./scripts/with-provider-env.sh nono run --profile ./nono/hermit.json --allow-cwd --allow-command npm --allow-bind 4321 -- npm run cli -- start
scripts.heartbeat-daemon: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh ./scripts/with-provider-env.sh nono run --profile ./nono/hermit.json --allow-cwd --allow-command npm -- npm run cli -- heartbeat-daemon
scripts.explorer: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh ./scripts/with-provider-env.sh nono run --profile ./nono/hermit.json --allow-cwd --allow-command npm --allow-bind 4321 -- env NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(pwd)" ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm --prefix explorer run dev
scripts.explorer:unsafe: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh env NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(pwd)" npm --prefix explorer run dev
scripts.explorer:build: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh ./scripts/with-provider-env.sh nono run --profile ./nono/hermit.json --allow-cwd --allow-command npm -- env NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(pwd)" ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm --prefix explorer run build
scripts.explorer:preview: ./scripts/with-local-npm.sh ./scripts/with-provider-env.sh nono run --profile ./nono/hermit.json --allow-cwd --allow-command npm --allow-bind 4321 -- env NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(pwd)" ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm --prefix explorer run preview
